# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Pipeline

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      setup_command:
        description: 'Command to run during setup phase (e.g., install dependencies)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No setup command specified"'
        type: string
      build_command:
        description: 'Command to run during build phase'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "No build command specified"'
        type: string
      test_command:
        description: 'Command to run during test phase'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No test command specified"'
        type: string
      post_build_command:
        description: 'Command to run after build and test phases (e.g., packaging, cleanup)'
        required: false
        default: 'echo "No post-build command specified"'
        type: string
      runner:
        description: 'Runner environment to use'
        required: false
        default: 'ubuntu-latest'
        type: choice
        options:
          - ubuntu-latest
          - ubuntu-22.04
          - windows-latest
          - macos-latest
      working_directory:
        description: 'Working directory for all commands'
        required: false
        default: '.'
        type: string
      shell:
        description: 'Shell to use for running commands'
        required: false
        default: 'bash'
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
          - python

jobs:
  custom-build:
    name: Custom Build
    runs-on: ${{ github.event.inputs.runner }}
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory }}
        shell: ${{ github.event.inputs.shell }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Print build configuration
        shell: bash
        working-directory: .
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "         Build Configuration Summary        "
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Runner:            ${{ github.event.inputs.runner }}"
          echo "Shell:             ${{ github.event.inputs.shell }}"
          echo "Working Directory: ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory }}"
          echo "Setup Command:     ${{ github.event.inputs.setup_command }}"
          echo "Build Command:     ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}"
          echo "Test Command:      ${{ github.event.inputs.test_command }}"
          echo "Post-Build Command:${{ github.event.inputs.post_build_command }}"
          echo "Triggered by:      ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Branch/Ref:        ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Setup phase
        id: setup
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.setup_command }}

      - name: Build phase
        id: build
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command }}

      - name: Test phase
        id: test
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.test_command }}

      - name: Post-build phase
        id: post_build
        if: always() && steps.build.outcome == 'success'
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.post_build_command }}

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory }}/dist/**
            ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory }}/build/**
            ${{ github.event.inputs.working_directory }}/output/**
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 14

      - name: Build status summary
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        working-directory: .
        run: |
          echo "## Build Results Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Phase | Status |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|-------|--------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Setup | ${{ steps.setup.outcome }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Build | ${{ steps.build.outcome }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Test | ${{ steps.test.outcome }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Post-Build | ${{ steps.post_build.outcome }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Triggered by:** ${{ github.actor }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Runner:** ${{ github.event.inputs.runner }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Shell:** ${{ github.event.inputs.shell }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
